## Why a new token?

<!-- shadcn base tokens are used as-is and never re-prefixed. The --lifi- namespace
     is only for tokens where the global cascade / third-party embedding make a
     unique prefix necessary. -->

- [ ] I checked that no existing **shadcn base token** already covers this need.
- [ ] I checked that no existing **`--lifi-*`** token already covers this need.
